global_description: Large, rectangular seating furniture with cushioned seats and backrest, typically upholstered in fabric or leather. Often features armrests on either side and sits on short legs or a solid base. Commonly found in living rooms, available in various colors, with a smooth or textured surface.

part_details.upholstery: Fabric or leather, smooth or textured

spatial_relations: Backrest attached to rear of seats
